title: Heatwaves and ozone together increase India’s cardiac deaths: study

J&K lost its statehood on Aug 5, 2019, when the Centre abrogated Article 370, revoked the region's special constitutional status and bifurcated the former state into two Union territories, J&K and Ladakh.

US senator says Tesla benefited from govt support, Elon Musk replies
description: Elon Musk has refuted claims that his companies, Tesla and SpaceX, owe their success to government aid, stating such incentives represent less than 2% of their value. The debate ignited between Senators Mike Lee and Ed Markey over taxpayer contributions to Musk's wealth. Musk asserted that removing EV tax credits actually boosted Tesla's market share.

Billionaire Mark Cuban warns 'Elons of the world' may see their wealth wiped out
description: Billionaire Mark Cuban warns even the wealthiest entrepreneurs face potential fortune loss from stock market crashes. He highlighted his past wealth exceeding Musk and Bezos combined, emphasizing his focus on passion over rankings. Cuban also voiced concerns about wealth concentration and shared his innovative strategy for safeguarding his $1.

title: Almost a year after giving engineers Claude and Cursor, Disney says, 'minimise AI-coded products'
description: Disney is urging its engineers to use AI tools like Claude and Cursor efficiently, focusing on boosting development speed without compromising code quality. The company aims to prevent AI-generated products from failing post-release, emphasizing productivity over excessive AI token usage. This strategic push follows a failed billion-dollar partnership with OpenAI.

title: Patrick Mahomes earns high praise from Andy Reid after extension
description: Patrick Mahomes has signed a massive contract extension with the Kansas City Chiefs. This deal makes him the first NFL player to earn over half a billion dollars. The quarterback’s new contract keeps him with the team until the 2033 season. His mother, Randi Mahomes, shared a proud message about his achievements on Instagram. Bill Barnwell predicts a massive contract extension could happen with Lamar Jackson.
